response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Audio phonetically matches the English lyrics in the reference JSON. 2. JSON Usage: Fully utilized for the English chorus. Manual transcription used for the opening Indonesian fragment and ad-libs. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timed to precise vocal bursts. Applied aggressive truncation for fast-paced lyrics to prevent cascading delays. Included visual text translation for the outro card.
